title: Candidate Home
text:
Application Submitted
Thank you for expressing interest in career opportunities with FNB Corporation!
This email is to confirm that we have received your application. In the event your skills and experience match the qualifications and job requirements associated with the position in which you have expressed interest, a member of our Talent Acquisition team will be in contact.
You have no more tasks.
Return to Home
